message:
fix(config): apply override values in TOML-less fallback paths

Config::load_with_overrides was silently discarding the overrides
parameter when no frankenterm.toml was present, returning bare defaults
instead. Extract defaults_with_overrides() that properly parses
overrides through Config::from_dynamic, runs consistency checks, and
computes extra defaults. Fixes tiered scrollback config keys and other
programmatic overrides not taking effect without a TOML file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
